item.title: EasyRec 1.18
item.description:
easyRec 1.18

MLX backend re-enabled — local LLMs now run on Apple Silicon GPU again, after the upstream mlx-swift-lm / swift-transformers conflict was resolved.

  • WhisperKit bumped to 0.18.0 with backward-compatible API usage
  • MLX models (Qwen 2.5 7B, Mistral 7B, Llama 3.1 8B, Gemma 2 9B) selectable from Settings → AI
  • Auto-summary now auto-loads the MLX model on demand instead of silently failing
  • New post-recording status banner with spinner: distinguishes downloading model (one-time ~4GB) from loading from cache (~30s) from generating
  • Settings → AI model picker redesigned: tap-row to select, "Loaded in RAM" indicator, decoupled Download from active selection
  • Long MLX loads now print a 10-second heartbeat to the log and cap at a 5-minute timeout instead of appearing frozen
  • Fixed cache path mismatch that caused HuggingFace weights to be re-downloaded on every run

Requires Apple's Metal Toolchain (auto-prompted on macOS 26 if missing).
